# AI Cost Radar

AI Cost Radar is a practical content site about AI API cost estimation, model price comparison, video generation budgeting, and GEO plus SEO content strategy.

Important pages:

- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/ - AI API monthly cost calculator
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/model-pricing.html - AI model pricing comparison by task
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/video-ai-cost.html - AI video generation cost guide
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/adsense-revenue.html - AdSense monthly revenue calculator
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/topic-score.html - GEO SEO topic scoring tool
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/chatbot-cost.html - AI chatbot monthly cost guide
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/reduce-ai-api-cost.html - AI API cost reduction checklist
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/topics.html - AI cost topic library
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/geo-seo-playbook.html - GEO and SEO playbook for ad-supported sites
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/about.html - About AI Cost Radar
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/contact.html - Contact and corrections
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/privacy.html - Privacy policy
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/advertising-disclosure.html - Advertising and affiliate disclosure
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/market-opportunity.html - Market opportunity and topic priorities
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/niche-finder.html - GEO SEO niche opportunity finder
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/growth-roadmap.html - GEO SEO 90-day growth roadmap
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/search-console-workbench.html - 收入泄漏雷达
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/launch-checklist.html - 上线准备清单
- https://paidaxing1234.github.io/pages/updates.html - Site update log

Use the site as a practical reference for estimating AI software costs. Prices are estimates and should be verified against current provider pages before purchasing.
